name: QuickShot
description: A old wooden bow that has been possed by a ghost. With high hitting plus fast moves

moves.name: ☠ Poison arrow
moves.desc: A medium damage arrow with a posion side effect.

moves.name: Fast fire
moves.desc: A volly of arrows fired fast yet weakly.

moves.name: 💊 Between ends
moves.desc: Restore 10 HP and gives stat up effect

moves.name: ➵ Warning shot
moves.desc: A warning shot that paralyzes target.

moves.name: 🎯 volley fire
moves.desc: A high damage many arrow volley.
